meta.name: Dev Station (dotfiles)
meta.author: Manifest OS
meta.description: A developer Hyprland setup whose look comes from a cloned dotfiles repo, with machine-specific bits layered on via `snippets`. Two shell hooks remain (Flatpak + default browser) — both tracked in examples/HOOKS-TO-PROMOTE.md as candidates for first-class blocks. Point `dotfiles.source` at your own repo.

files.content:
# Managed by Manifest OS
[init]
    defaultBranch = main
[pull]
    rebase = true
[core]
    editor = nvim
[alias]
    st = status -sb
    lg = log --oneline --graph --decorate

# Managed by Manifest OS
add_newline = true
command_timeout = 1000

[character]
success_symbol = "[❯](bold green)"
error_symbol = "[❯](bold red)"

[directory]
truncation_length = 3
style = "bold cyan"

[git_branch]
symbol = " "
style = "bold purple"

[git_status]
style = "bold yellow"

[cmd_duration]
min_time = 2000
format = "took [$duration](bold yellow) "

snippets.content:
# Added by Manifest OS on top of the dotfiles config
exec-once = waybar
exec-once = mako
exec-once = manifest-wallpaper

post_install: sudo -u dev xdg-settings set default-web-browser firefox.desktop || true
